svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Transformer" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-494" dy="-275" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;" value="Transformer Encoder–Decoder for Machine Translation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="700" x="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontColor=#666666;" value="6-layer encoder (self-attention) + 6-layer decoder (masked self-attention + cross-attention)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="120" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hdr_e" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9673a6;" value="ENCODER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="120" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hdr_d" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9673a6;" value="DECODER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="560" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="emb_e" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Input Embeddings
(batch × 512 × 768)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="140" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pos_e" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="+ Positional Encoding
(sinusoidal, D = 768)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="140" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="enc" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;" value="Encoder Layer × 6" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="260" x="120" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sa" parent="enc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Multi-Head Self-Attention
(h = 12 heads, d_k = 64)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="20" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_an1" parent="enc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ff" parent="enc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Feed-Forward
(768 → 3072 → 768, ReLU)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="20" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_an2" parent="enc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="emb_d" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Output Embeddings (shifted right)
(batch × 512 × 768)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="580" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pos_d" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="+ Positional Encoding
(sinusoidal, D = 768)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="580" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;" value="Decoder Layer × 6" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="510" width="260" x="560" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_sa" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Masked Multi-Head Self-Attention
(causal mask, h = 12)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="20" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_an1" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_ca" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Multi-Head Cross-Attention
(Q from decoder, K/V from encoder)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="20" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_an2" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="278" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_ff" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Feed-Forward
(768 → 3072 → 768, ReLU)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="20" y="348" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_an3" parent="dec" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Add & Norm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="428" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lin" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Linear Output Projection
(768 → vocab_size)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="580" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="soft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Softmax" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="580" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Output Probabilities
(batch × 512 × vocab_size)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="580" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee1" edge="1" parent="1" source="emb_e" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pos_e" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pos_e" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="e_sa" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee3" edge="1" parent="1" source="e_sa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="e_an1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee4" edge="1" parent="1" source="e_an1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=9;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="e_ff" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee5" edge="1" parent="1" source="e_ff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="e_an2" value=""> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pos_d" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="de2" edge="1" parent="1" source="pos_d" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d_sa" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="de3" edge="1" parent="1" source="d_sa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d_an1" value=""> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d_ca" value=""> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d_an2" value=""> <mxGeometry style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="lin" value="(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oe2" edge="1" parent="1" source="lin" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="soft" value="(B, 512, vocab_size)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oe3" edge="1" parent="1" source="soft" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="out" value="(B, 512, vocab_size)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cross" edge="1" parent="1" source="enc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9673a6;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="d_ca" value="Encoder output
K, V → cross-attention
(B, 512, 768)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="470" y="465" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Legend (layer type)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="240" x="120" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Embedding / Output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="50" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Positional Encoding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="50" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Attention (self / masked / cross)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="185" x="50" y="76" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Add & Norm (residual + LayerNorm)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="185" x="50" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Feed-Forward / Linear" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="50" y="124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg6" parent="legend" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="30" x="12" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg6t" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Softmax" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="50" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;" value="Notation:
B = batch size
T = 512 (sequence length)
D = 768 (d_model / embedding dim)
vocab_size = target vocabulary size

Tensor shape (B, 512, 768) is preserved
through every encoder & decoder sub-layer." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="280" x="120" y="870" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Notation:
B = batch size
T = 512 (sequence length)
D = 768 (d_model / embedding dim)
vocab_size = target vocabulary size
Tensor shape (B, 512, 768) is preserved
through every encoder & decoder sub-layer.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
